## Pack Name
e.g., "Notion", "Slack", "Linear"

## Description
What does this pack enable?

## Tools
List the tools this pack would include:
- `tool_1` — description
- `tool_2` — description

## Required Env Vars
What credentials does this pack need?

## API Documentation
Link to the API docs for the service.

## Complexity Estimate
How complex is this to implement? (low / medium / high)
